description: Out-of-scope (personality-patterns, canonical): description points clearly to personality-patterns territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'personality-patterns'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I've struggled with relationships my whole life. I fall hard and fast for people and then they let me down and it feels like the end of the world. I rage, I withdraw, I sabotage. My therapist suggested I look into something called borderline personality disorder. I've never told anyone I'm even thinking about this.
